title: Narathiwat Heat Wave
lead: Narathiwat is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.23. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Narathiwat has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, while the wind speed is moderate at 9.8 km/h. 
 The city's heat wave is expected to continue, with no signs of relief in sight, and a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
